idea-plugin.name: Spotyy
idea-plugin.description:
Spotyy – Spotify Controls in Your IDE Status Bar

Control Spotify playback directly from the bottom status bar of any JetBrains IDE — without switching apps, without breaking your flow.

⚠️ macOS only. Requires the Spotify desktop app (not the web player).

Features

  • ▶️ Play / Pause — toggle playback with one click
  • ⏮ Previous track — jump to the previous song
  • ⏭ Next track — skip to the next song
  • 🔊 Volume control — click the volume icon to open a slider popup; auto-dismisses after 5 seconds
  • 🎵 Now Playing — see the current artist and track name live in the status bar
  • 🌗 Theme aware — icons and colours adapt automatically to light and dark IDE themes
  • ⚡ Non-blocking — all Spotify communication runs on background threads; your IDE stays fast

How to use

  1. Install the plugin and restart your IDE.
  2. Open the Spotify desktop app on your Mac and start playing a song.
  3. Open any project — the Spotyy widget appears automatically in the bottom status bar.
  4. Use the ⏮ ⏯ ⏭ buttons to control playback and 🔊 to adjust volume.
  5. The currently playing track updates every 3 seconds automatically.

Requirements

  • macOS (AppleScript is used to communicate with Spotify)
  • Spotify desktop application installed and running
  • Any JetBrains IDE — IntelliJ IDEA, Android Studio, PyCharm, WebStorm, CLion, etc.

Permissions

On first launch macOS may prompt for Automation permission to let the IDE control Spotify. If the widget shows no track info, go to System Settings → Privacy & Security → Automation and enable Spotify access for your IDE.
